----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, March 26, 2007 3:45:27 PM
Subject: plan


I sent you the JP plan again. Anya wants me to set up another meeting to finalize the materials. I picked most the last time and I like them but the meeting is for you to decide. I am sending pictures just for orientation but they look much nicer in real life.. The small glass kitchen wall stripes can be in any color. 
In the bowling alley Mark wanted to use the same white wood flooring he is using for PB. I haven't seen it. When should I tell her we can meet ? Mark will be out of the office 
April 5th -11th.
